testData.name: AI Companion for Lab Test Results
testData.description: AI Companion based on Google's Gemini that seamlessly analyzes up to five years of personal lab data to help explain results and uncover potential health risks

sourceTitle: Quest Diagnostics: Launches AI Companion for Lab Test Results
snippet: AI Companion based on Google's Gemini that seamlessly analyzes up to five years of personal lab data to help explain results and uncover potential health risks
